title: MAP 6.13: Implement cost governance and kill-switch halt enforcement
description: Implementation task for approved TASK-151 specs. Build the cost-governance helpers and kill-switch halt store/enforcement path described by MAP_System/artifacts/planning/map-cost-governance-spec.md and map-kill-switch-spec.md. Coordinate with TASK-152 validator halt wiring so validator_blocking_anomaly uses this halt store as the single source of truth.
acceptance_criteria: Implements a durable, human-inspectable halt store matching map-kill-switch-spec.md with scoped states, clear evidence, and authority checks.
Implements cost telemetry/budget counter helpers from map-cost-governance-spec.md without treating unknown paid cost as zero.
Runner and agent-loop can read halt state before dispatch/claim and suppress blocked lanes while allowing permitted repair/review/local work.
Tests cover halt set/clear authority, paid-dispatch halt, global halt, cost missing/unknown handling, and runner/agent-loop blocked-dispatch behavior.
